name: pool
description: /pool <args> — sidecar-OWNED `pool` CLI (host roster + remote exec — minimal, zero deps). Source bin/pool.hexa relocated into the plugin; install.hexa builds it to ~/.hx/bin/pool.bin + installs the shim. Canonical entry `sidecar pool <args>`; bare `pool` is a kept-working deprecation shim. Verbs: list · add <host> · on <host> <cmd> · status · health · route · bg · refresh · init · rm <host> · clean · desc. NL trigger via skill ('pool 호스트', '다른 호스트에서 돌려', 'remote exec'). Roster SSOT ~/.pool/pool.json (pool-route hook untouched). Pairs with commons g9.
